title: Training Budget and Professional Development Request Process
text:
Q: How can I request training budget and professional development opportunities?
A: Employees interested in professional development opportunities can request training budget by submitting a Professional Development Request Form. This form should include details about the training program, its relevance to your role, and the estimated costs. Once completed, submit the form to your direct supervisor for initial approval. If approved, it will be forwarded to the HR department for final review and budget allocation. Please ensure requests are submitted at least four weeks before the training date to allow sufficient processing time. Approval is based on available budget and alignment with departmental goals.
